# Mouliqe — AI Solutions & Data Architecture Consulting

## About
Mouliqe is an independent AI consulting practice founded by Imtiaz Ahmed. The name is a Bengali word meaning fundamental, original, foundational — reflecting the approach of building AI solutions on the right foundation.

## Founder
Imtiaz Ahmed — AI Solutions Architect and Data Consultant with over a decade of experience in marketing analytics, production AI systems, and data architecture at Fortune companies. Built production AI systems that reduced manual processing time by 80-95%.

## Services
1. AI Solutions & Architecture — Custom AI application development, intelligent process automation, AI architecture design and review, model integration and orchestration, conversational AI systems, AI strategy consulting.
2. Data Engineering & Infrastructure — Data pipeline design and implementation, data warehouse architecture, system integration and ETL development, data quality frameworks, infrastructure modernization.
3. Analytics & Business Intelligence — Dashboard and reporting development, KPI framework design, executive reporting systems, self-service analytics setup, data visualization strategy.

## Differentiators
- Evaluates whether AI is even the right solution before recommending it. Sometimes automation or better data infrastructure is the answer.
- Bridges the gap between business problems and technical solutions — understands both sides deeply.
- Hands-on architect and developer, not a project manager who outsources work.
- Discovery and Diagnosis phases are free. Clients only pay starting from the Blueprint phase.
- Transparent about cost, timeline, and expectations at every step.

## Engagement Process
00 Discovery (free) — Understand the business, challenges, and goals.
01 Diagnosis (free) — Evaluate the situation and recommend an approach.
02 Blueprint (paid) — Design the detailed technical architecture.
03 Build (paid) — Phased implementation with milestone checkpoints.
04 Refine (paid) — Tune and validate in the real-world environment.
05 Support (included) — Two months of post-project support included.

## Target Audience
Businesses of all sizes navigating AI transformation — from startups evaluating their first AI investment to enterprises fixing broken AI systems or modernizing data infrastructure.

## Blog Topics
AI architecture, multi-agent systems, RAG pipelines, AI guardrails, context window management, AI memory systems, AI cost optimization, data quality, POC-to-production gaps, AI strategy for business.
